items.title: Perplexity Launches Brain, a Self-Improving Memory System That Builds a Context Graph of an Agent’s Work and Learns Overnight
items.summary: Perplexity has launched Brain, a self-improving memory system for its Computer agent. Instead of remembering the user, Brain remembers the agent's work — what worked, what failed, and what corrections got made. It builds a traceable context...

items.title: Improving health intelligence in ChatGPT
items.summary: Learn how GPT-5.5 Instant improves ChatGPT’s health and wellness responses with stronger reasoning, better context, clearer communication, and physician-informed evaluations.

items.title: The KV Cache Compression Race: TurboQuant vs OSCAR vs EpiCache
items.summary:
The KV cache now outweighs model weights at long context. Here's how TurboQuant, OSCAR, and EpiCache each attack that memory bottleneck — and why they're more complementary than competitive.

items.title: Microsoft sells OpenAI models in China. OpenAI and Anthropic won’t.

items.title: Using AI to help physicians diagnose rare genetic diseases affecting children
items.summary: Researchers used an OpenAI reasoning model to help diagnose rare diseases, identifying 18 new diagnoses in previously unsolved cases.
